changeSet.author: mini-erp
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO permissions (id, code, resource, action, description) VALUES (uuid_generate_v4(), 'uom:update', 'uom', 'update', 'Update units of measure or categories'), (uuid_generate_v4(), 'uom:delete', 'uom', 'delete', 'Delete units of measure or categories') ON CONFLICT (code) DO NOTHING;

changeSet.author: mini-erp
